description: Processed DRC Ebola historical curve library for AI-assisted historical matching in the DRC Bundibugyo dashboard.
curve_units: cases; daily interpolated cumulative curves; final_size_for_projection used for analog final-size scaling.

matching_recommendation.primary_matching_distance: weighted RMSE on log1p cumulative cases after scaling each historical curve to the current observed cumulative curve
matching_recommendation.end_date_definition: first date followed by 42 consecutive days below the model zero threshold

features.notes: Onset date selected; the supplement may not fully represent the official outbreak total.
Notification date selected because it captures the largest case count in the supplement and is report-like.
Notification date selected; onset dates are largely missing in the supplement.
Onset date selected because notification dates are incomplete.
Onset date selected because notification dates capture fewer records than onset dates.
Notification date selected because it is closest to report-date series and nearly complete.
DRC MoH report-level confirmed+probable national curve; cumulative monotone corrected; official final size 54 used for projection scaling.
Weekly national confirmed+probable curve; daily values linearly interpolated for matching; official final size 3481 used.

method_label.ja: AI支援による過去流行マッチング

model_tabs_ja: AI支援による過去流行マッチング

interpretation_note_ja: 過去のDRCエボラ流行曲線との類似度をAI支援で評価し、現在の流行曲線にスケーリングして最終サイズを補助的に推定する。単独の予測ではなく、Branching process modelと組み合わせたEnsembleとして表示することを推奨する。
interpretation_note_en: AI-assisted analog forecasting that scores similarity to previous DRC Ebola epidemic curves and scales matched curves to the current trajectory. It should be used as an auxiliary projection and preferably displayed as part of an ensemble with the branching-process model.
